name: Trend Pullback With Volatility Filter
description: A trend-following template that waits for pullbacks inside an established trend and filters out low-volatility noise.
recommended_for: Swing traders who want fewer noisy entries
key_modules: trend filter; pullback entry; ATR stop; time-based exit
main_risks: late entries; whipsaw in sideways regimes

name: Breakout With Retest Confirmation
description: A breakout template that requires price expansion and a retest confirmation before entering.
recommended_for: Momentum traders who want fewer false breakouts
key_modules: range detection; breakout trigger; retest check; volume filter; stop loss
main_risks: missed trades; false breakouts during news spikes

name: Mean Reversion With Regime Filter
description: A mean-reversion template that only trades when the market is not strongly trending.
key_modules: z-score entry; trend-regime filter; max holding period; stop loss

name: Alert-First Forward Test Monitor
description: A monitoring template for users who already have TradingView alerts and want to evaluate live alert quality before execution.
key_modules: webhook logging; signal outcome tracking; alert latency check; report generation
main_risks: requires enough live alerts to become statistically useful

name: Research-Inspired ETF Rotation
description: A rotation template that ranks ETF candidates using momentum and risk filters.
recommended_for: Users who want a transparent research-inspired allocation strategy
key_modules: cross-sectional rank; volatility scaling; rebalance schedule; drawdown control

name: Paid Script Buyer Check
description: A due-diligence template for checking whether a purchased script or indicator has credible claims and live behavior.
recommended_for: Users evaluating paid indicators or invite-only scripts
key_modules: claim checklist; non-repaint warning; alert log review; forward-test requirement
main_risks: limited if source code is unavailable

name: Webhook Reliability Monitor
description: A data-product template that treats alert messages as event data and tracks delivery frequency outcomes and missing fields.
key_modules: webhook payload parser; event schema; missing-field check; outcome attribution
